title: New Book Explores Ancient Tea Horse Road as Path to Self-Discovery
description: The Tea Horse Road was an ancient high-altitude trade route connecting Yunnan, Sichuan, and the Tibetan Plateau in China, serving as a lifeline where tea and horses were exchanged for survival. title: AG Ford sues Trump administration over fossil fuel emissions regulation
